texto: Shino looked at me straight in the eye and smiled, her face brimming with a kind of inner strength. That strength seemed to gather the beads of perspiration that glistened on her brow, then sprang from her face and leapt across to my heart with a rhythm like ripples on water.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Tetsuo Miura: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. O trecho “Shino looked at me straight in the eye and smiled, her face brimming with a kind of inner strengt…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que amor, inspiration, love pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de inspiracao e love.

frase_original: Shino looked at me straight in the eye and smiled, her face brimming with a kind of inner strength. That strength seemed to gather the beads of perspiration that glistened on her brow, then sprang from her face and leapt across to my heart with a rhythm like ripples on water.
